package rulefixtures

// scenario for panic_for_expected_errors: `panic()` used for expected error conditions like invalid input or missing config
// fixture polarity: positive; family: performance; severity: warning.
type Rule621PositiveRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario621Positive(records []Rule621PositiveRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		for _, value := range record.Values {
			total += len(value) + record.ID
		}
	}
	return total
}
